stemHtml: A turbojet aircraft, while in cruise and approaching the top of descent, it loses GNSS capability. Which action by the pilot is the most correct ?

options.a: Begin descent and continue the planned RNAV arrival using dead-reckoning.
options.b: Descend to MSA and proceed visually without advising ATC.
options.c: Maintain current level while you positively fix your position with other nav sources (e.g., VOR/DME/INS) before commencing the descent, and advise ATC.
options.d: Continue the planned arrival; no action is needed until the approach.
